name: alertdog-mcp
description: MCP server and packaged skill scripts for AlertDog tools.

scripts.build: yarn workspace @alertdog/core build && yarn workspace @alertdog/cli build && yarn workspace @alertdog/mcp build && node dev-scripts/link-workspace-packages.mjs && yarn workspace @alertdog/skills build
scripts.publish:all: npm publish ./packages/core --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm publish ./packages/cli --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm publish ./packages/mcp --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm publish ./skills --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/
